Looking at the PAPER.JSON block's reproducibility.commands field:

```json
"commands": [
  "git clone https://github.com/da-code-bench/da-code",
  "cd da-code && docker build -t da-code .",
  "docker run da-code python evaluate.py --model gpt-4 --split test"
]
```

The command to reproduce the main benchmark results (Table 1) appears to be:

{"command": "docker run da-code python evaluate.py --model gpt-4 --split test"}
